entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: An important macronutrient needed for grain yield, grain N and grain protein content in rice

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total weight of grains produced per unit area

entities.name: GRAIN N
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen contained within the grains

entities.name: GRAIN PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The proportion of protein in the grains

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop species being studied, specifically diverse genotypes

entities.name: N AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The availability of nitrogen in the soil or through application

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE STAGE N REMOBILIZATION
entities.description: The process of moving nitrogen from vegetative tissues to grains during the reproductive stage

entities.name: N PARTITIONING TO GRAIN
entities.description: The distribution of nitrogen specifically to the grain

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: The research approach involving two years of field trials with 30 rice genotypes

entities.name: N DEFICIENT
entities.description: A condition with no external nitrogen application (N0)

entities.name: N SUFFICIENT
entities.description: A condition with 120 kgha-1 external nitrogen application (N120)

entities.name: NDVI VALUE
entities.description: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index, used as a measure of plant health and biomass

entities.name: BIOMASS ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The total accumulation of organic matter in the plant

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass

entities.name: GRAIN N ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The total amount of nitrogen accumulated in the grains

entities.name: POST-ANTHESIS N UPTAKE
entities.description: The uptake of nitrogen by the plant after flowering

entities.name: N REMOBILIZATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which nitrogen is remobilized from vegetative tissues to grains

entities.name: N GRAIN PRODUCTION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency of nitrogen use specifically for grain production (NUEg)

entities.name: N USE EFFICIENCY COMPONENT TRAITS
entities.description: Specific traits that contribute to the overall nitrogen use efficiency

entities.name: FERTILIZER N RECOVERY RATE
entities.description: The proportion of applied nitrogen fertilizer recovered by the crop

entities.name: SITE SPECIFIC N MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A management approach to apply nitrogen based on specific site needs

entities.name: KALINGA-1
entities.description: A rice genotype showing high N remobilization under N sufficient conditions and good N use efficiency

entities.name: BAM-4234
entities.description: A rice genotype showing high N remobilization under both N sufficient and N deficient conditions

entities.name: IR-8384-B-B102-3
entities.description: A rice genotype showing high N remobilization under both N sufficient and N deficient conditions

entities.name: SAHBHAGI DHAN
entities.description: A rice genotype showing high N remobilization under N sufficient conditions

entities.name: BVD-109
entities.description: A rice genotype showing high N remobilization under both N sufficient and N deficient conditions

entities.name: NERICA-L-42
entities.description: A rice genotype showing high N remobilization under N sufficient conditions

entities.name: 83929-B-B-291-3-1-1
entities.description: A rice genotype showing high N remobilization efficiency under N deficiency and good N use efficiency

entities.name: RANBIR BASMATI
entities.description: A rice genotype efficient in N grain production efficiency under N deficient conditions

entities.name: BAM-832
entities.description: A rice genotype efficient in N grain production efficiency under N deficient conditions

entities.name: APO
entities.description: A rice genotype efficient in N grain production efficiency under N deficient conditions and good N use efficiency

entities.name: BAM-247
entities.description: A rice genotype efficient in N grain production efficiency under N deficient conditions

entities.name: IR-64
entities.description: A rice genotype efficient in N grain production efficiency under N deficient conditions

entities.name: VANDANA
entities.description: A rice genotype efficient in N grain production efficiency under N deficient conditions

entities.name: NERICA-L-44
entities.description: A rice genotype efficient in N grain production efficiency under N deficient conditions and good N use efficiency

entities.name: PUSA BASMATI-1
entities.description: A rice genotype performing well for N use efficiency component traits
